channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Visual Studio Code 1.113】Visual Studio 代码 1.113
item.description: 【Learn what's new in Visual Studio Code 1.113 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.113 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【Your Entire Engineering Floor Just Stopped Coding】您的整个工程车间刚刚停止编码
item.description: 【And the developers running Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI didn't notice... Status Page Says 'Operational.' Your Subagents Say Otherwise. If you're running autonomous agents in any serious capacity, you've experienced this: 】运行 Claude Code 和 GitHub Copilot CLI 的开发人员没有注意到……状态页面显示“可操作”。您的子代理另有说法。如果您正在以任何严肃的身份运行自主代理，您就会经历过以下情况：

item.title: 【Designing for Eventual Consistency for Microsoft Entra】为 Microsoft Entra 的最终一致性进行设计
item.description: 【Microsoft Entra is a globally distributed service that provides identity and access management to millions of customers world-wide. To scale reliably and remain resilient during failures, Microsoft Entra uses an eventually consistent directory model. Key takeaway A successful write to Microsoft Entra does not guarantee tha】Microsoft Entra 是一项全球分布式服务，为全球数百万客户提供身份和访问管理。为了可靠地扩展并在故障期间保持弹性，Microsoft Entra 使用最终一致的目录模型。要点 成功写入 Microsoft Entra 并不能保证

item.title: 【Unlock More Power in Your Development Workflow: Syncfusion for Visual Studio Subscribers】在您的开发工作流程中释放更多力量：适用于 Visual Studio 订阅者的 Syncfusion
item.description: 【A few months ago, I was talking with a developer who said something that stuck with me: “I love building apps. I just don’t love rebuilding the same UI controls over and over again.” 】几个月前，我与一位开发人员交谈，他说了一句话让我印象深刻：“我喜欢构建应用程序。我只是不喜欢一遍又一遍地重建相同的 UI 控件。”

item.title: 【Windows 95 defenses against installers that overwrite a file with an older version】Windows 95 防御安装程序用旧版本覆盖文件
item.description: 【Back in the days of 16-bit Windows, many system components were redistributable, meaning that programs that used those components could include a copy of those system components and install them onto the system as part of the program's installer. The guidance for installing the system components was that if the installer finds a copy of the】早在 16 位 Windows 时代，许多系统组件都是可重新分发的，这意味着使用这些组件的程序可以包含这些系统组件的副本，并将它们作为程序安装程序的一部分安装到系统上。安装系统组件的指导是，如果安装程序找到

item.title: 【📢LangChain4j got a new video series】📢LangChain4j 有了新的视频系列
item.description: 【We recently released a step-by-step course f】我们最近发布了分步课程

item.title: 【SQL code analysis in VS Code: Configure rules without editing your project file】VS Code 中的 SQL 代码分析：无需编辑项目文件即可配置规则
item.description: 【SQL code analysis has been part of the SSDT workflow for a long time. Before deploying a schema change, you could run a set of static analysis rules against your project to catch potential issues, things like missing primary keys, deprecated syntax, or objects tha】SQL 代码分析长期以来一直是 SSDT 工作流程的一部分。在部署架构更改之前，您可以针对项目运行一组静态分析规则以捕获潜在问题，例如缺少主键、不推荐使用的语法或不正确的对象。

item.title: 【Manage SQL database schemas in VS Code: Publish dialog and item templates】在 VS Code 中管理 SQL 数据库架构：发布对话框和项目模板
item.description: 【Making schema changes often means jumping between tools. You write code in VS Code, then switch to a separate tool to deploy your changes : exporting a script, running it manually, or copy-pasting into a query editor. Either way, it pulls you out of your flow.】更改架构通常意味着在工具之间跳转。您在 VS Code 中编写代码，然后切换到单独的工具来部署更改：导出脚本、手动运行它或复制粘贴到查询编辑器中。不管怎样，它都会把你从你的流程中拉出来。

item.title: 【Agentic Platform Engineering with GitHub Copilot】使用 GitHub Copilot 进行代理平台工程
item.description: 【We've talked about the human scale problem and what happens when infrastructure scales but understandin】我们已经讨论了人力规模问题以及基础设施规模扩大时会发生什么，但了解

item.title: 【Generative AI for Beginners .NET: Version 2 on .NET 10】.NET 初学者生成式 AI：.NET 10 上的版本 2
item.description: 【Today we're releasing Version 2 of Generative AI for Beginners .NET, our free, open-source course for building AI-powered .NET applications. If you want to understand and build generative AI applications, from core concepts to production-ready patterns, this is you】今天，我们发布了面向初学者 .NET 的生成式 AI 第 2 版，这是我们用于构建 AI 驱动的 .NET 应用程序的免费开源课程。如果您想了解和构建生成式人工智能应用程序，从核心概念到生产就绪模式，这就是您
